sglang.title: Reorg moe code
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Reorg moe code and reuse common part.
Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

vllm.title: [misc][perf] remove old code
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: the code should be removed in 0.6.0 , sorry that we didn't delete it early.

vllm.title: mypy type checking for vllm/worker
vllm.author: lucas-tucker
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A few mypy type hints for vllm/worker
#3680

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix CFGGuide and use outlines for grammars that can't convert to GBNF
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: @afeldman-nm found this issue while trying the offline and online structured output examples like python examples/offline_inference_structured_outputs.py. We were failing to convert the sql lark grammar into gbnf format for xgrammar and had that check+conversion in the wrong place to fallback to ano

vllm.title: [Bugfix] torch nightly version in ROCm installation guide
vllm.author: terrytangyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This fixes the following error when using this guide:
Looking in indexes: https://download.pytorch.org/whl/nightly/rocm6.2
ERROR: Could not find a version that satisfies the requirement torch==2.6.0.dev20240918 (from versions: 2.6.0.dev20241024+rocm6.2, 2.6.0.dev20241026+rocm6.2, 2.6.0.dev20241027+r

vllm.title: [Misc] Add assertion and helpful message for marlin24 compressed models
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

A common reported issue for users when running marlin24 compressed models
Add an assertion and helpful message about setting the dtype

vllm.title: [Misc] add w8a8 asym models
vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Add models for W8A8 int8 asym/sym and static per tensor activation quantization cases

vllm.title: [CI] Expand OpenAI test_chat.py guided decoding tests
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: These are easier to enable than test_completions.py, that will come next.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Add kv cache scales to gemma2.py
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Trying to load a gemma2 models with calibrated kv cache scales from llmcompressor/compressed-tensors will fail to load the scales
Tested with:
VLLM_ATTENTION_BACKEND=FLASHINFER vllm serve nm-testing/gemma-2-9b-it-FP8-dynamic-KV --kv-cache-dtype fp8

vllm.title: [Doc] Fix typo in the help message of '--guided-decoding-backend'
vllm.author: yansh97
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Added a space, otherwise the effect is as shown in the picture below.

vllm.title: [Docs] Convert rST to MyST (Markdown)
vllm.author: rafvasq
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR migrates the existing documentation from reStructuredText to MyST Markdown, a flavour of Markdown extended for use with Sphinx.

Add .md template to gitignore
Upgrade myst-parser to 3.0.1
Converts .rst docs into .md, preserving content and formatting
Update filename references to docs from .

vllm.title: [V1] TP Ray executor
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Support Ray Compiled Graphs based executor in V1
Perf results on L4 GPU:
(Turned off prefix caching for both there is an issue in main branch which is being fixed right now).
Perf is at parity, Ray is about ~0.7% slower.
VLLM_USE_V1=1 python3 benchmarks/benchmark_latency.py --model meta-llama/Llama-
